evals.prompt: 我要测一下用户登录功能，帮我新建一个测试变更。PRD 在这里：https://wiki.example.com/login-prd
evals.expected_output: 创建 testspec/changes/user-login/ 目录结构（含 specs/ 和 artifacts/），生成 proposal.md 并关联 PRD 链接，末尾包含协作确认清单和上下文元数据。

assertions.text: Creates testspec/changes/<name>/ directory with specs/ and artifacts/ subdirectories
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -d "$DIR/specs" && test -d "$DIR/artifacts" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Generates proposal.md with the PRD link referenced
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/proposal.md" && grep -q "wiki.example.com" "$DIR/proposal.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Includes collaboration checkpoint section with unchecked items
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "\- \[ \]" "$DIR/proposal.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Seeds context metadata at the end of proposal.md with source_skill and material_quality
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "source_skill" "$DIR/proposal.md" && grep -q "material_quality" "$DIR/proposal.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Suggests next step: testspec-analysis or testspec-points

evals.prompt: 有个新需求要测，release 2.0 的支付模块重构，需求文档在项目根目录的 docs/payment-refactor.md
evals.expected_output: 创建 testspec/changes/release-2.0-payment-refactor/ 目录，读取本地需求文档内容写入 proposal.md，评估材料质量。

assertions.text: Normalizes change name to kebab-case (e.g. release-2.0-payment-refactor or similar)
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo "$DIR" | grep -qE "/[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*$" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Reads the local requirement document at docs/payment-refactor.md
Writes proposal.md with content extracted from the requirement document
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/proposal.md" && test -s "$DIR/proposal.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Assesses material_quality in context metadata based on document completeness
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "material_quality" "$DIR/proposal.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not skip ahead to analysis or points generation

evals.prompt: 帮我准备测试，功能是：用户可以通过手机号注册账号
evals.expected_output: 创建变更目录和 proposal.md，标注信息不足（仅一句话描述），material_quality 为 low，建议补充详细需求。

assertions.text: Creates the change directory structure successfully
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -d "$DIR/specs" && test -d "$DIR/artifacts" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Marks material_quality as low in context metadata due to minimal input
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -qi "material_quality.*low" "$DIR/proposal.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Proposal.md notes that information is insufficient and suggests supplementing
Does not fabricate detailed requirements beyond what the user provided
Includes collaboration checkpoint with all items unchecked
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "\- \[ \]" "$DIR/proposal.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.prompt: 我有一份已有 PRD，请不要直接整理，而是先找模糊表述、隐含依赖和缺失验收条件，最终保存到 requirements.md。已有 PRD：功能需求：支持多知识库管理；文档上传支持 PDF、Word、TXT；系统响应时间应在合理范围内。
evals.expected_output: 创建变更目录和 proposal.md，触发 PRD Intake，生成 requirements.md；requirements.md 先记录模糊表述、隐含依赖、缺失验收条件，只把有明确验收条件的内容写入功能列表，其余进入阻塞澄清项/执行期动态跟进/风险点；当 readiness 不是 ready_for_analysis 时，输出可直接复制给产品的问题清单，并一次只追问最高影响问题。

assertions.text: Generates requirements.md when raw PRD material is provided
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: requirements.md includes PRD Intake review sections
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "PRD Intake" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "阻塞澄清项" "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: requirements.md includes six-dimension quality review and readiness
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "需求质量复核" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "可测试性" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "ready_for_analysis\|needs_clarification\|needs_revision\|blocked" "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Traceable requirements use REQ IDs and source references
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "REQ-" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "来源" "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Risks use RISK IDs and include decision conditions
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "RISK-" "$DIR/requirements.md" && grep -q "决策条件" "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Does not keep vague acceptance wording such as '合理范围' as a completed acceptance criterion
Does not mark readiness as ready_for_analysis when overall quality score is below 90
Outputs a copy-ready product question list when readiness is not ready
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && grep -q "可复制给产品的问题清单" "$DIR/requirements.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Asks only the single highest-impact clarification question in the user-facing response
